description: Configure a product attribute 'finish_color' (Label: 'Finish Color') as a 'Visual Swatch' with three options: 'Matte Black' (#2C2C2C), 'Brushed Gold' (#D4AF37), and 'Polished Chrome' (#E6E6FA). The attribute must be filterable (with results) in Layered Navigation, visible on Catalog Pages on Storefront, and used in Search Results Layered Navigation. Use credentials admin/Admin1234! if required.
